message:
chore(gitignore): add patterns for ephemeral debug/scratch files

Add ignore rules for common agent-generated ephemeral artifacts:
- /expanded.rs (cargo expand output)
- /test_*.rs and their compiled binaries (root-level scratch test files)
- /run_test.sh (one-off test runner scripts)
- src/channel/deadlock_test.rs (standalone bug reproduction harness)
- Broaden ubs_output.txt to ubs_*.txt for all UBS output variants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -114,8 +114,28 @@ repro_*.rs
 artifacts/
 
 # UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) output
-ubs_output.txt
+ubs_*.txt
 
 # Generic scratch output
 output.txt
 *.diff
+
+# Cargo expand output
+/expanded.rs
+
+# Root-level scratch test files and their compiled binaries
+/test_*.rs
+/test_debug.rs
+/test_rank.rs
+/test_rng
+/test_rng.rs
+/test_seed
+/test_seed.rs
+/test_seed_*
+/test_vecdeque.rs
+
+# One-off test runner scripts
+/run_test.sh
+
+# Standalone bug reproduction / debugging harnesses
+src/channel/deadlock_test.rs
